title: SOCIAL SERVICES AND EMERGENCY AID - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY SOCIAL SERVICES SOCIAL SERVICES AND EMERGENCY AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with clothing, furniture, bus passes, and water service payment assistance. Electric service payment assistance is available seasonally or as funding is available. 922 N Central Avenue Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: -Electric service payment assistance: Pacific Power customers -Water service payment assistance: Medford Water Commission customers -All services: Must meet households at 80% or less of Area Median Income, although exceptions may be made Hours: -Electric service payment assistance offered October-April -Phone: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm -Appointments are scheduled for Tuesdays (541) 773-6965 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 773-6965 Main phone Main phone (541) 773-6965 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Photo ID including driver's licenses, state ID cards, passports, military ID, foreign country ID, and some university ID -Electric or water assistance: A copy of shut off notice LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: RVTD bus line 40 Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Furniture Gas Service Payment Assistance General Clothing Provision Transportation Passes Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - ASSISTANCE FOR OLDER ADULTS MATERIAL GOODS - SALVATION ARMY FAMILY STORE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY SOCIAL SERVICES
